calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Removing Trustee; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Demand For Accounting, And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julio Ramos specially appearing for Attorney Amy Harrington for Lea Waters Clee. Joseph Haselton for Jesse Waters (Petitioner).

Mr. Haselton addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes, stated that Jesse could write the checks and obtain receipts from the Beneficiaries and that there was no opposition to 6th Account. The Petition for Order Removing Trustee, etc. and the status hearing regarding filing of the receipt for the blocked account were taken off calendar. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review/modification of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4135 Easar Chaves Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Hasselton for Trustee.

Mr. Hasselton presented an endorsed copy of the waiver of notice by Lea Waters-Clee and stated the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $650,000.00. The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status for filing of said receipt was set for April 20, 2010. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Demand For Accounting, And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Continued To Mar-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Haselton for Jessie Waters (Trustee). Amy Harrington for Lea Waters Klee.

Mr. Haselton stated that the lot had not been sold, that there were no offers, that it was still listed at $675,000.00 and that they would consider lowering the price if no offers were received by the end of the month. In addition, Mr. Haselton stated that the accounting was filed today with a hearing date of March 8, 2010, that it would be served today, that the accounting covered pre and post death, and that he needed to know what the allegations are for the removal of the Trustee. The accounting petition filed by Mr. Haselton was continued from March 8, 2010 to March 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Today's matter was also continued to March 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Objections are due by March 3, 2010.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Accounting And Sale Of The Lot
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Continued To Mar-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Removing Trustee; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Demand For Accounting, And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for and with Lea Waters-Clee (Petitioner). Joe Hassleton for Jessie Waters (Trustee).

The Court asked Counsel about participating in mediation. Ms. Harrington stated that additional discovery needed to be conducted before mediation and that they needed a full accounting. Mr. Hassleton stated that he had no opposition to providing an accounting, that the only issue was with the sale of the lot, that he preferred to do the accounting after the sale and that there weren't a lot of proceeds. Ms. Harrington requested the proceeds from the sale of the lot go into a blocked account. Mr. Hassleton stated that the lis pendens was holding up the sale of the lot, and requested it be removed from the lot as well as the Ocean Street property (Jessie's house). The Court ordered the Lis Pendens be removed from the lot only, that the lot be sold with Court confirmation and that the proceeds be deposited into a blocked account. In addition, the Court ordered Mr. Hassleton to provide an accounting to all Parties without the Court's involvement, stated that if there was no agreement on said accounting, then the Parties would attend mediation. The Petition for Order Removing Trustee was continued to January 12, 2010 and will be decided after mediation. Status on the accounting and sale of the lot was also set for January 12, 2010.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Order Determining Whether Proposed Action Would Consistute A Trust Contest
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joe Haselton for Jessie Waters (Trustee). Amy Harrington for Lea Waters-Clee.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court found that the petition does not violate the no contest clause.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Mendoza.
